meaning: n.蛛ｶ辟ｶ,蜿ｯ閭ｽ諤ｧ,諢丞､紋ｺ区腐,蜿ｯ閭ｽ蜿醍函逧‼刋蟶ｦ莠倶ｻｶ
examples: The dispatch of the task force is purely a contingency measure.
We should be prepared for any contingency.
Nick Black, DCCL chief executive officer, said contingency plans are in place to minimise disruption.
He told the BBC contingency measures were in place, although he would not go into details.
